entry.title: The Drone and the Worker
entry.summary:
by purrliacci

He hates Optimus Prime. He hates Orion Pax. Attachment to anything was dangerous, and there’s definitely going to be a rule against getting too attached to what seems to be his own Lord’s past attachment. A rule that is not to be written in S-73’s energon.

entry.title: Stargazing
entry.summary:
by Lang_Tich

"Look, Orion. A shooting star. Did you make a wish?"
"Ah! I didn't have time."
"And there is something you wish for?"
"Yes..."
"What did you wish?"
"I was wishing..."

The Autobots and Decepticons take their fight to Earth only to end up as victims in an underground battle arena that they can bot escape.

entry.title: Someone Kicked a Rock
entry.summary:
by LemonsGod

I quite like Makeshift in Transformers prime and it’s quite upsetting that they killed off an over powered character. So I am switching up the story! This is kinda of a rewrite of transformer prime but I’m mainly focusing on the Decepticons.

Makeshift, a decepticon with the ability to transformer into another cybertronians with only the knowledge of knowing their frame. A powerful spy when needed and a great warrior in battle. But what if he isn’t as loyal as they came? Or at least not to Megatron. He joined the decepticons for the cause not to serve blindly.

Or

I added more Makeshift into the story bc my brain can’t calm down over the idea.

entry.title: get up
entry.summary:
by DragonsGirl572

Optimus tipped the bottle to his lips, relishing the burn that slithered down his throatpipe. He unceremoniously plopped onto the rolling desk chair in his berth. Outside, he could hear the yelling and running occurring, but as much as he hated to admit it, he didn’t care. And Optimus hated himself for not caring. As much as he wanted himself to get up and throw the bottle away to help with the search, he couldn’t. He couldn’t will himself to get up and do anything but drink himself to death.

Words: 969, Chapters: 1/1, Language: English

entry.title: Sparks Shining Beyond Appearances
entry.summary:
by MaroonLeoInvestedCrybaby

The reader gets a bad haircut and feels self-conscious about it. They're forced to confront it when their guardian, Ratchet, calls them back to the base. Thankfully, Autobots don’t care about appearances; they only see the dazzling spark inside.

entry.title: My Little Whipping Boy and Seeker-Cyberdog
entry.summary:
by StarwolfDevision

In effort to prevent becoming a completely owned chattel slave, with no rights or say... Devision offers himself to the services of (mostly) Starscream and to a lesser degree, his Trinemates. Being a slave exclusively to the Command Trine only. He is to serve as Starscream's Whipping Boy, that is, to take physical punishments so Starscream can vent upon him.... and release the pent-up angry, violent urges...but in a controlled manner. Dev will always recieve prompt and complete (adequate) medical care after such a use and be fueled regularly and reliably in turn for his service. He will be given protections under the care of the Command Trine, but he will still not be 'equal' to them in that he is a Whipping Boy and their pet Seeker-Cyberdog. That is, a Seeker that serves and acts as a Cyberdog. His two roles mean he won't be treated as a mech, but he won't be abused outside his role as a Whipping Boy.

He has less rights, but is still free from excessive cruel and unusual punishment. He will be subjected to potentially embarrassing and humiliating treatment, but he won't complain, argue, fuss or fight such treatment. He will accept and give in obediently.

Will they want more than this from him in time?

Words: 2598, Chapters: 1/1, Language: English

entry.title: The Ethics of Repair
entry.summary:
by hokori_ii

pinpoint, a slightly unsociable NAIL [neutral aligned indigenous life-form] autobot-leaning aerial medic, writes under the pen-name Axion Praxis during its spare time.

the work of Axion Praxis is less of actual professional takes and more of journaling and personal musings.

and yet, for some miraculous reason, when it submits its work expecting it to be buried under more well-known authors and archivists, it explodes in popularity.

pinpoint is, with lack of a better term, aghast. and slightly mollified. so of course it absolutely refuses to expose itself as Axion Praxis.

Words: 1284, Chapters: 2/?, Language: English

Series: Part 1 of The Archives of Axion Praxis

entry.title: We will not lose touch
entry.summary:
by Cellarcraft

Stacey Maker is the original female character in almost all of my Transformers fanfics.
Here I will describe Stacey as a person who lost her home, but did not lose faith in herself and took responsibility for her adopted daughter Ella Maker, who was abandoned by her real parents. Ella's stepfather wanted to kill this girl, but he did not succeed. Her mother, Janet Bright, has filed all the paperwork to give up her daughter and take custody of her daughter, so that whoever finds her daughter will be her mother or father, anyone if they can.
And with this responsibility and new friends, Stacey is bound to learn the truth about what her ring wears as a Cybertronian artifact that made its way to Earth.

entry.title: Dawn of a new Day
entry.summary:
by IcyPheonix

Everything has finally come to a head.

Ratchet is missing, taken by Soundwave. The Omega Lock is mere moments away from completion.
So it's a race against time to find the missing medic and stop Megatron before he can unleash hell upon Earth.

Storming Darkmount had been one thing, the only goal there had been to bring it down. This was completely different, this was a rescue mission deep into the enemy base, and it terrified Ignis.

If only he knew what awaited him.

entry.title: Isn't She Lovely
entry.summary:
by articulatememe

Noah hummed, placing a hand over Mirage’s servo, smile widening at the little yawn his sparkling let out. “You hear that, mi vida? You’re perfect…”

“Heh, you talkin’ to me?” Mirage grinned, and Noah was already rolling his eyes before he could even finish his sentence. “Can’t believe you’re flirting in front of our daughter, sweetspark. In front of Ratchet, too. That’s bold.”

-

aka noah got mirage meched pregged when their heart/spark merged during the final battle in rotb

entry.title: the aftermath
entry.summary:
by DragonsGirl572

Ratchet had been taking care of him ever since Elita died. Bumblebee was glad that no one sugar-coated anything. They told him straightforwardly that Elita was injured in combat and died on the operating table. The thing is, he wasn’t sad, or happy, he didn’t feel anything. In the six months he was here, the youngling wasn’t really close to his aunt, not like how Optimus or Commander Magnus were.
